title: Latch issue with clock gating signal

features.name: latch inference with clock-gated always block
features.description: Code should include a latch inferred from an always block with sensitivity list @(clk or d) using a level-sensitive if condition (clk == 1'b0) without else branch

features.name: verilator clock_enable attribute on signal
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with the verilator clock_enable attribute applied to signals used in clock gating logic

features.name: gated clock assignment with concatenation and AND
features.description: Code should include a gated clock assignment using replication {N{clk}} ANDed with an enable signal

features.name: flip-flop using gated clock
features.description: Code should include a flip-flop module instantiation that uses a gated clock signal (gclk_vld) instead of the original clock
